specific_question: During Q3 2025, are there certain times when Lee’s Market employees across all regions struggle the most to get IT issues resolved?
answer: According to Lee’s Market internal IT performance reports from Q3 2025, service desk requests spike by 40% on Mondays and Fridays at around 11 a.m., with average resolution times increasing by up to 3 hours when self-service guidance is unclear.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Lee’s Market expand and optimize its IT self-service capabilities to reduce service desk dependency, accelerate resolution times, and improve both employee and customer experience across all stores?
